rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF EARL GEARLDS
rulings.Calendar Matter: PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 09/09/19. The court does not have a courtesy copy of the status petition. File stamped single sided courtesy copies are required for any papers filed with the court and must be dropped off at the Superior Court in room 202. (LRSF 2.7, 14.6). The court does not have an order for the status petition. A hard copy of the proposed order must be dropped off at the Superior Court in room 202. LR 14.93. (Proposed orders may not be e-filed.)

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF SOO MI MUI CHAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: continued to september 16, 2019 (first available date). despite LRSF 2.7.B. and the preliminary tentative ruling, no file stamped hard copy of the amended petition has been provided to the examiner in room 202 and no proposed order has been provided to the examiner in room 202 as required. in addition, no new POS of the NOH form filed as of thursday, august 15, 2019. the deadline for filing the POS and providing the copy of the amended petition and proposed order to the examiner is noon on wednesday, september 11, 2019, in order to avoid an appearance for the sole issue of providing a file stamped copy and order to the examiner ( courtcall would NOT be approved for that appearance). please note, faxed or emailed copies and orders are NOT accepted.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF BARBARA QUIGLEY
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 9/16/19. No response to examiner notes. Publication must be redone. The first publication date of the notice shall be at least 15 days before the hearing. Three publications in a newspaper published once a week or more often, with at least five days intervening between the first and last publication dates, not counting the publication dates, are sufficient. (Prob. Code, § 8121(a)). Must file Declaration of Real Property (SFA-001). LRSF 14.27. Thomas Quigley has priority for appointment and has not filed a nomination or declination. (Prob. Code, §§ 8441, 8461). The names and dates of death for decedent’s parents are not included on attachment 8. (LRSF 14.26).
